name: Crab Imperial
recipeIngredient: 2 slices White bread, crusts removed and cubed
recipeInstructions:
Remove all cartilage from the crabmeat. In a medium-sized pan, melt butter or margarine, then mix in flour. Slowly add milk while stirring constantly to keep the mixture smooth and free of lumps. Continue cooking over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Stir in onion, Worcestershire sauce, and bread cubes. Allow the mixture to cool.
In another pan, melt butter or margarine until lightly browned. Add crabmeat and toss lightly. Combine this with the sauce mixture. Pour into individual shells or ramekins (or a greased 1-quart casserole). Sprinkle with Paprika. Bake at 450°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until hot, bubbly, and lightly browned on top.
